nodes.name: Daily 8AM Trigger (Mon-Fri)
nodes.notes: Runs every weekday at 8:00 AM. Adjust cron expression for your timezone. Format: 'minute hour day month weekday'.

nodes.name: Read Invoices Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create Google Sheet 'Invoices' with columns: Invoice_ID, Client_Name, Client_Email, Amount, Currency, Due_Date, Status, Reminder_Count, Last_Reminder_Date. Status values: Unpaid, Paid, Overdue, Cancelled.

nodes.name: Filter Overdue Invoices
nodes.notes: CUSTOMIZE: Adjust the reminder schedule (daysPastDue thresholds) to match your business terms.

nodes.name: Any Reminders Needed?
nodes.notes: If no invoices need reminders today, the workflow stops cleanly here.

nodes.name: Build Reminder Email
nodes.notes: CUSTOMIZE: Edit the email templates in the templates object. Replace all [REPLACE_WITH_*] placeholders with real info.

nodes.name: Send Reminder Email
nodes.notes: SETUP: Add SMTP credentials. The email is sent from the authenticated account.

nodes.name: Update Reminder Count
nodes.notes: Updates the Reminder_Count and Last_Reminder_Date in the sheet so the same invoice isn't reminded again too soon.

motionElevation.description: Daily invoice reminder system. Reads unpaid invoices from a Google Sheet and sends escalating reminder emails at: -3 days (pre-due), due day, +3, +7, +14, +30 days. Tracks reminder count to avoid duplicate sends.
